name: seo
description: SEO monitoring, keyword tracking, content decay detection, and blog draft generation. Supports GA4 and Umami analytics backends. Delivers weekly intelligence reports via WhatsApp.
author: CupBots
intent: SEO analytics, keyword tracking, content decay, blog drafts, Google Analytics, Umami, traffic reports, SERP rankings
not_intent: Social media posting, advertising, PPC campaigns

config.label: Google OAuth Client ID
config.help: For GA4 backend. Create at console.cloud.google.com

marketplace.long_description: Agentic SEO monitoring that replaces expensive agencies. Connects to Google Analytics 4 or Umami, tracks keyword rankings via DataForSEO, detects content decay, and generates data-driven blog drafts. Weekly intelligence reports delivered straight to WhatsApp — no dashboards needed.
